```{r pptx-export, fig.show='hide'}
    scale_fill_viridis_c(
      option = "C",
      name = "Records (log)",
      labels = function(x) fmt_n(round(expm1(x))),
      na.value = "white"
    ) +
    coord_sf(xlim = c(-20, 55), ylim = c(-40, 40)) +
    labs(title = "Geographic Coverage — SSA") +
    theme_void(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(
        face = "bold", color = "#1a1a2e",
        size = 14, hjust = 0.5
      ),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.key.width = unit(2, "cm")
    )
  fig4 <- save_fig(p_map_slide, "map", w = 8, h = 7)

  ppt <- ppt %>%
    add_slide(layout = "Title and Content",
              master = "Office Theme") %>%
    ph_with(value = "Geographic Distribution",
            location = ph_location_type(type = "title")) %>%
    ph_with(
      value = external_img(fig4, width = 7, height = 5.5),
      location = ph_location(left = 1.5, top = 1.5,
                              width = 7, height = 5.5)
    )
}

# ── Slide 5: Outcome Rates by Study ──
if (exists("sb_by_study") && exists("nnd_by_study")) {
  p_sb_s <- ggplot(
    sb_by_study,
    aes(x = reorder(study, SBR), y = SBR, fill = SBR)
  ) +
    geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_gradient(low = "#fee090", high = "#d73027") +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(title = "A. Stillbirth Rate",
         x = NULL, y = "SBR per 1,000")

  p_nnd_s <- ggplot(
    nnd_by_study,
    aes(x = reorder(study, NND_rate), y = NND_rate,
        fill = NND_rate)
  ) +
    geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_gradient(low = "#e0f3f8", high = "#4575b4") +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(title = "B. Neonatal Death Rate",
         x = NULL, y = "NND per 1,000 LB")

  p_outcomes <- p_sb_s + p_nnd_s +
    plot_annotation(
      title = "Perinatal Outcome Rates by Study"
    )
  fig5 <- save_fig(p_outcomes, "outcomes_study",
                    w = 12, h = 6)

  ppt <- ppt %>%
    add_slide(layout = "Title and Content",
              master = "Office Theme") %>%
    ph_with(value = "Outcome Rates by Study",
            location = ph_location_type(type = "title")) %>%
    ph_with(
      value = external_img(fig5, width = 9, height = 5),
      location = ph_location(left = 0.5, top = 1.5,
                              width = 9, height = 5)
    )
}

# ── Slide 6: Birth Characteristics ──
if (exists("plots_dist") && length(plots_dist) >= 2) {
  p_birth <- plots_dist$ga + plots_dist$bw +
    plot_annotation(
      title = "Birth Characteristic Distributions"
    )
  fig6 <- save_fig(p_birth, "birth_chars", w = 12, h = 5)

  ppt <- ppt %>%
    add_slide(layout = "Title and Content",
              master = "Office Theme") %>%
    ph_with(value = "Birth Characteristics",
            location = ph_location_type(type = "title")) %>%
    ph_with(
      value = external_img(fig6, width = 9, height = 4.5),
      location = ph_location(left = 0.5, top = 1.5,
                              width = 9, height = 4.5)
    )
}

# ── Slide 7: Ridgeline by Study ──
if (exists("plots_ridge") && length(plots_ridge) >= 2) {
  p_ridge <- plots_ridge$ga + plots_ridge$bw +
    plot_annotation(
      title = "GA & Birthweight by Study"
    )
  fig7 <- save_fig(p_ridge, "ridgeline", w = 12, h = 7)

  ppt <- ppt %>%
    add_slide(layout = "Title and Content",
              master = "Office Theme") %>%
    ph_with(value = "GA & Birthweight by Study",
            location = ph_location_type(type = "title")) %>%
    ph_with(
      value = external_img(fig7, width = 9, height = 5.5),
      location = ph_location(left = 0.5, top = 1.5,
                              width = 9, height = 5.5)
    )
}

# ── Slide 8: Model Readiness ──
if (exists("model_ready")) {
  ready_counts <- model_ready %>% count(readiness, name = "n")
  colors_ready <- c(
    "Global model" = "#43a047",
    "Type-specific model" = "#1976d2",
    "Study-specific model" = "#ff9800",
    "Descriptive only" = "#e53935"
  )
  p_ready <- ggplot(
    ready_counts,
    aes(x = reorder(readiness, n), y = n,
        fill = readiness)
  ) +
    geom_col(show.legend = FALSE, alpha = 0.9) +
    geom_text(
      aes(label = paste0(n, " vars")),
      hjust = -0.1, size = 4, color = "#1a1a2e"
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = colors_ready) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2))
    ) +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(title = "Variable Readiness for Modeling",
         subtitle = paste0(
           "Thresholds: Global>=",
           params$global_threshold,
           "% | Type>=", params$type_threshold,
           "% | Study>=", params$study_threshold, "%"
         ),
         x = NULL, y = "N Variables")
  fig8 <- save_fig(p_ready, "readiness", w = 10, h = 5)

  ppt <- ppt %>%
    add_slide(layout = "Title and Content",
              master = "Office Theme") %>%
    ph_with(value = "Pre-Modeling Readiness",
            location = ph_location_type(type = "title")) %>%
    ph_with(
      value = external_img(fig8, width = 9, height = 5),
      location = ph_location(left = 0.5, top = 1.5,
                              width = 9, height = 5)
    )
}

# ── Slide 9: Candidate Variables Lollipop ──
if (exists("candidates") && nrow(candidates) > 0) {
  top30 <- candidates %>%
    arrange(desc(pct_global)) %>%
    slice_head(n = 30) %>%
    mutate(
      variable = factor(variable, levels = rev(variable)),
      tier = factor(readiness, levels = c(
        "Global model", "Type-specific model",
        "Study-specific model"
      ))
    )
  p_cand <- ggplot(
    top30,
    aes(x = variable, y = pct_global, color = tier)
  ) +
    geom_segment(
      aes(xend = variable, y = 0, yend = pct_global),
      linewidth = 0.7
    ) +
    geom_point(size = 2.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(
      "Global model" = "#43a047",
      "Type-specific model" = "#1976d2",
      "Study-specific model" = "#ff9800"
    )) +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(title = "Top 30 Candidate Variables",
         x = NULL, y = "% Complete",
         color = "Tier")
  fig9 <- save_fig(p_cand, "candidates", w = 10, h = 8)

  ppt <- ppt %>%
    add_slide(layout = "Title and Content",
              master = "Office Theme") %>%
    ph_with(value = "Candidate Variables for Modeling",
            location = ph_location_type(type = "title")) %>%
    ph_with(
      value = external_img(fig9, width = 9, height = 5.5),
      location = ph_location(left = 0.5, top = 1.5,
                              width = 9, height = 5.5)
    )
}

# ── Slide 10: Covariate Availability Heatmap ──
if (exists("cov_long") && nrow(cov_long) > 0) {
  p_heatmap_slide <- ggplot(cov_long, aes(x = study, y = variable, fill = pct_available)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(pct_available), "%")), size = 2.5, color = "grey20") +
    scale_fill_gradientn(
      colours = c("#d73027", "#fc8d59", "#fee090", "#91bfdb", "#4575b4"),
      values = scales::rescale(c(0, 25, 50, 75, 100)),
      limits = c(0, 100), name = "% Available"
    ) +
    labs(title = "Covariate Availability by Study", x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8))
  fig_heat <- save_fig(p_heatmap_slide, "cov_heatmap", w = 12, h = 8)

  ppt <- ppt %>%
    add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
    ph_with(value = "Covariate Availability Heatmap",
            location = ph_location_type(type = "title")) %>%
    ph_with(value = external_img(fig_heat, width = 9, height = 5.5),
            location = ph_location(left = 0.5, top = 1.5, width = 9, height = 5.5))
}

# ── Slide 11: SB by Age + NND by BW ──
sb_age_exists <- !is.na(V_SB) && !is.na(V_AGE)
nnd_bw_exists <- !is.na(V_NND) && !is.na(V_BW)

if (sb_age_exists || nnd_bw_exists) {
  cross_plots <- list()

  if (sb_age_exists) {
    d_sb <- tibble(sb = to01(df[[V_SB]]), age = safe_num(df[[V_AGE]])) %>%
      filter(!is.na(sb), !is.na(age), age >= 10, age <= 60) %>%
      mutate(age_cat = factor(case_when(
        age < 18 ~ "<18", age < 20 ~ "18-19", age < 25 ~ "20-24",
        age < 30 ~ "25-29", age < 35 ~ "30-34", age < 40 ~ "35-39", TRUE ~ "40+"
      ), levels = c("<18", "18-19", "20-24", "25-29", "30-34", "35-39", "40+")))

    tab_sb <- d_sb %>% group_by(age_cat) %>%
      summarise(N = n(), SB = sum(sb == 1), SBR = rate_1000(SB, N), .groups = "drop")

    cross_plots$sb <- ggplot(tab_sb, aes(x = age_cat, y = SBR, fill = SBR)) +
      geom_col(show.legend = FALSE, alpha = 0.85) +
      scale_fill_gradient(low = "#fee090", high = "#d73027") +
      labs(title = "A. Stillbirth Rate by Maternal Age", x = "Age Group", y = "SBR per 1,000")
  }

  if (nnd_bw_exists) {
    d_nnd <- tibble(nnd = to01(df[[V_NND]]), bw = safe_num(df[[V_BW]])) %>%
      filter(!is.na(nnd), !is.na(bw), bw >= 300, bw <= 6000) %>%
      mutate(bw_cat = factor(case_when(
        bw < 1000 ~ "<1000g", bw < 1500 ~ "1000-1499g",
        bw < 2500 ~ "1500-2499g", bw < 4000 ~ "2500-3999g", TRUE ~ ">=4000g"
      ), levels = c("<1000g", "1000-1499g", "1500-2499g", "2500-3999g", ">=4000g")))

    tab_nnd <- d_nnd %>% group_by(bw_cat) %>%
      summarise(N = n(), NND = sum(nnd == 1), NND_rate = rate_1000(NND, N), .groups = "drop")

    cross_plots$nnd <- ggplot(tab_nnd, aes(x = bw_cat, y = NND_rate, fill = NND_rate)) +
      geom_col(show.legend = FALSE, alpha = 0.85) +
      scale_fill_gradient(low = "#e0f3f8", high = "#4575b4") +
      labs(title = "B. NND Rate by Birthweight", x = "BW Category", y = "NND per 1,000 LB")
  }

  if (length(cross_plots) == 2) {
    p_cross <- cross_plots$sb + cross_plots$nnd +
      plot_annotation(title = "Outcome Rates by Risk Factor")
  } else {
    p_cross <- cross_plots[[1]] + plot_annotation(title = "Outcome Rate by Risk Factor")
  }
  fig_cross <- save_fig(p_cross, "cross_tabs", w = 12, h = 5)

  ppt <- ppt %>%
    add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
    ph_with(value = "Outcomes by Risk Factor",
            location = ph_location_type(type = "title")) %>%
    ph_with(value = external_img(fig_cross, width = 9, height = 5),
            location = ph_location(left = 0.5, top = 1.5, width = 9, height = 5))
}

# ── Slide 12: Summary / Conclusions ──
ppt <- ppt %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content", master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = "Key Findings",
          location = ph_location_type(type = "title")) %>%
  ph_with(value = paste0(
    "Dataset: ", fmt_n(N_TOTAL), " records from ",
    N_COUNTRIES, " SSA countries, ", N_STUDIES, " studies\n\n",
    if (!is.na(sbr)) paste0("Stillbirth rate: ", sbr, " per 1,000 total births\n") else "",
    if (!is.na(nnd_rate)) paste0("Neonatal death rate: ", nnd_rate, " per 1,000 live births\n") else "",
    "\nKey observations:\n",
    "- DHS contributes ~85% of records\n",
    "- Significant heterogeneity across studies\n",
    "- Maternal age, birthweight, and GA strongly associated with outcomes\n",
    "- Missing data patterns vary by study source\n\n",
    "Next steps: variable selection, collinearity assessment, predictive modeling"
  ), location = ph_location_type(type = "body"))

# ── Slide 13: Key Recommendations ──
ppt <- ppt %>%
  add_slide(layout = "Title and Content",
            master = "Office Theme") %>%
  ph_with(value = "Key Recommendations",
          location = ph_location_type(type = "title")) %>%
  ph_with(value = paste0(
    "1. Global model: ", if (exists("global_vars"))
      nrow(global_vars) else "?",
    " variables with >=", params$global_threshold,
    "% completeness\n\n",
    "2. Consider median (IQR) for clinical summaries ",
    "(skewed distributions)\n\n",
    "3. Missing data: MICE for 10-40% missingness; ",
    "study-specific models for sparse variables\n\n",
    "4. Next: define outcome, select predictors, ",
    "evaluate collinearity\n\n",
    "5. DHS dominates (~85%): consider sensitivity ",
    "analyses excluding DHS"
  ), location = ph_location_type(type = "body"))

print(ppt, target = pptx_path)

# Clean up temp figures
unlink(fig_dir, recursive = TRUE)
```

<div class="success-box">
**Outputs exported:**

- Excel workbook: `r file.path(params$output_dir, "LSHTM_Descriptive_Analysis.xlsx")`
- PowerPoint: `r file.path(params$output_dir, "LSHTM_Descriptive_Presentation.pptx")`
</div>

```{r session-info}
cat("R version:", R.version.string, "\n")
cat("Date:", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "\n")
cat("Platform:", sessionInfo()$platform, "\n\n")
cat("Key packages:\n")
pkgs <- c("dplyr", "ggplot2", "plotly", "gtsummary", "gt", "DT", "pheatmap")
for (p in pkgs) {
  cat(sprintf("  %s: %s\n", p, as.character(packageVersion(p))))
}
```

---

<div style="text-align:center; padding:30px; color:#8e99a4; font-size:0.9em;">
  <strong>LSHTM Perinatal Outcomes Prediction Project</strong><br>
  Audencio Victor | London School of Hygiene & Tropical Medicine<br>
  Report generated on `r format(Sys.Date(), '%d %B %Y')` with R `r R.version.string`
</div>
